_comment: Global codebase-memory-mcp (cbm) server entry. Merged into ~/.claude/.mcp.json by install-global.sh ONLY when the cbm binary is present ({{CBM_BIN}} is resolved at install time). cbm is the Python/TS/Go code-discovery backend; a pure-C#/WPF machine can skip it (use serena + a Roslyn MCP instead — see profiles/csharp/adopt.md).
